title: oxalis spiralis var. glandulosa
intro: Oxalis spiralis var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular wood sorrel, is a plant species within the oxalis genus, characterized by its distinctive spiral leaves and hairy stems. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Oxalis spiralis var. glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
